case_title: EL-SHAAR, ANWAR VS MCKINSEY, BRIAN C/O KRAGEN AUTO PARTS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY EL-SHAAR, ANWAR AS TO DEFENDANT MCKINSEY, BRIAN C/O KRAGEN AUTO PARTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO BRIAN MCINSEY RETURNED AND SIGNED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EL-SHAAR, ANWAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCKINSEY, BRIAN C/O KRAGEN AUTO PARTS $65.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $85.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MCKINSEY, BRIAN C/O KRAGEN AUTO PARTS
